title: E-Commerce Funnel & Retention Analytics
description: Built a 5-stage conversion funnel on 320K+ event records and designed monthly cohort retention grids showing ~87% month-1 retention.
codeSnippet:
SELECT user_id,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', first_purchase) AS cohort_month,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS activity_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
FROM orders
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3;

title: Customer Segmentation & Behavioral Analysis
description: Engineered and analyzed 541,909 e-commerce transaction records using RFM framework with K-Means clustering for customer targeting.
codeSnippet:
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans

kmeans = KMeans(
    n_clusters=4,
    init='k-means++',
    random_state=42
)
df['cluster'] = kmeans.fit_predict(rfm_scaled)

title: PwC Power BI Dashboard Project
description: Designed and built impactful Power BI dashboards for PwC, applying key visualization techniques to surface actionable business insights from complex datasets.
codeSnippet:
-- DAX Measure Example
Total Revenue = 
  CALCULATE(
    SUM(Sales[Revenue]),
    FILTER(
      Sales,
      Sales[Date] >= TODAY() - 365
    )
  )
